title: Record Holder
description: Adds a record holder in the game!
body:
This mod adds Record Holders into the game that well- Can hold your records! _Or music discs I guess..._

It's crafted with two iron ingots, wooden planks and tinted glass.

## Recipe shape
![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9554648281e2050c18c5c38e464663e468d5872.png)
